<!-- To verify freshness: alef verify --exit-code -->

# tree-sitter-language-pack

> A Rust core that bundles 306 tree-sitter grammars behind one parsing and code-intelligence API, with native bindings for Python, TypeScript / Node.js, Rust, Go, Java, Kotlin (Android), C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Dart, Swift, Zig, WebAssembly, and C/C++ (FFI), plus the `ts-pack` CLI. Parsers download on demand and cache locally.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/getting-started/installation/): Install for Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java, Kotlin (Android), C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Dart, Swift, Zig, WebAssembly, C/C++ (FFI), or the `ts-pack` CLI.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/getting-started/quickstart/): Parse your first file and run code intelligence in minutes.
- [AI Coding Assistants](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/ai-coding-assistants/): Install the plugin into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Factory Droid, GitHub Copilot, or opencode.

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/concepts/architecture/): Rust core with polyglot bindings — where each binding lives and how it reaches Rust.
- [Download Model](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/concepts/download-model/): How parsers are fetched on demand, cached locally, and reused across runs.
- [Code Intelligence](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/concepts/code-intelligence/): Structure, imports, exports, comments, symbols, and chunking pipeline.

## Guides

- [Parsing Code](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/parsing/): Build syntax trees, choose a language, walk nodes, recover from errors.
- [Code Intelligence](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/intelligence/): Extract structure, imports, exports, comments, docstrings.
- [Chunking for LLMs](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/chunking/): Split source at natural boundaries for embeddings and prompt windows.
- [Configuration](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/configuration/): `PackConfig` and `ProcessConfig` options.
- [Extraction Queries](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/extraction/): Tree-sitter queries for custom extractors.
- [Building from Source](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/building/): Compile the Rust core and bindings locally.
- [Docker](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/docker/): Container image with `ts-pack` and the parser cache pre-populated.
- [Performance & Benchmarks](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/performance/): Throughput characteristics and tuning.

## CLI

- [CLI Usage](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/guides/cli/): `ts-pack` command-line reference (`download`, `parse`, `process`, `list`).

## API Reference

- [Python API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-python/): Python binding reference.
- [TypeScript / Node.js API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-typescript/): Node.js native-addon binding reference.
- [Rust API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-rust/): Rust core library reference.
- [Go API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-go/): Go module reference (cgo).
- [Java API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-java/): Java binding reference (Foreign Function & Memory).
- [C# API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-csharp/): C# / .NET binding reference (P/Invoke).
- [Ruby API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-ruby/): Ruby binding reference (Magnus).
- [PHP API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-php/): PHP extension reference (ext-php-rs).
- [Elixir API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-elixir/): Elixir binding reference (Rustler NIF).
- [WebAssembly API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-wasm/): WebAssembly binding reference.
- [C / FFI API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/api-c/): C FFI surface (header + shared library).
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/configuration/): Full configuration options.
- [Types](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/types/): Type definitions across bindings.
- [Errors](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/reference/errors/): Error categories and handling patterns.
- [Supported Languages](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io/languages/): The full list of 306 supported grammars.

## Xberg Ecosystem

- [Xberg](https://docs.xberg.io): Document intelligence: text, tables, metadata from 91+ formats with optional OCR
- [Xberg Enterprise](https://enterprise.xberg.io): Managed extraction API with SDKs, dashboards, and observability
- [crawlberg](https://docs.crawlberg.xberg.io): Web crawling and scraping with HTML to Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback
- [html-to-markdown](https://docs.html-to-markdown.xberg.io): Fast, lossless HTML to Markdown engine
- [liter-llm](https://docs.liter-llm.xberg.io): Universal LLM API client with native bindings for 14 languages and 143 providers

## Generated CLI Inventory

- `ts-pack`: Tree-sitter language pack CLI
- `ts-pack cache-dir`: Print the effective cache directory
- `ts-pack clean`: Remove all cached parser libraries
- `ts-pack completions`: Generate shell completions
- `ts-pack download`: Download parser libraries
- `ts-pack info`: Show details about a language
- `ts-pack init`: Create a language-pack.toml config file
- `ts-pack list`: List available languages
- `ts-pack mcp`: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server
- `ts-pack parse`: Parse a file and output the syntax tree
- `ts-pack process`: Run code intelligence pipeline

## Generated MCP Inventory

- `cache_dir`: Return the effective parser cache directory path.
- `clean_cache`: Delete all cached parser libraries from the cache directory.
- `detect_language`: Detect the language for a file path or source content. Returns the detected language name.
- `download`: Download parser libraries from the remote registry. Pass languages list, groups, or all=true. \
                       Set fresh=true to clean the cache first.
- `info`: Show whether a language is known, downloaded, and its cache path.
- `list_languages`: List languages. source: 'available' (default), 'downloaded', or 'manifest'. Optional substring filter.
- `parse`: Parse source code with a tree-sitter grammar. Returns the syntax tree as sexp or JSON.
- `process`: Run the code-intelligence pipeline on source code. Extracts structure, imports, exports, symbols, and more.
